S.FORM: Kenny Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 10, Kenny Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Kenny Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 10, Kenny Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kennj an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, kennj an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
